onboarding.title: Tell us about your company
onboarding.description: Three short steps. After moderator review your company appears in the directory.

hints.shortDescription: Up to 160 characters — shown on the company card.
hints.logo: PNG or JPEG, up to 5 MB. Square images work best.
hints.coverGap: The cover image isn't returned by the public profile endpoint yet — we'll show it as soon as backend exposes it.

onboarding.submitError: Couldn't create the company. Check the fields and try again.
onboarding.successToast: Company submitted for review. We'll let you know.

statusBanner.draftDescription: Finish company registration to start publishing products.
statusBanner.pendingDescription: We'll review your application within a few business days. The dashboard is available in read-only mode.
statusBanner.rejectedDescription: Update the company info and submit again.
statusBanner.blockedDescription: Contact support to lift the block.

overview.comingDescription: KPIs and a sales-trend chart land in the next iteration.

products.comingDescription: Upload products and manage your catalog — coming in the next step.
products.loadErrorDescription: Check your connection and try again.
products.emptyDescription: Add your first product to appear in the catalog.

row.confirmDescription: This can't be undone. The product will be removed from the catalog.
row.deleteError: Couldn't delete the product. Please try again.

form.noCompanyDescription: You can't add products without a company. Finish onboarding.
form.attributesGap: Dynamic attributes will land once the backend exposes per-category schemas.
form.submitError: Couldn't save the product. Check the fields and try again.
form.createSuccess: Product created and submitted for moderation.

leads.comingDescription: Buyer requests will appear here with accept/reject actions.
leads.emptyDescription: Buyer requests will show up here.

row.rejectDescription: Tell the buyer why — they'll see the reason.

messages.comingDescription: Buyer chat lands when the messaging module is ready.
messages.placeholderDescription: Open a thread on the left — it expands into the full chat.

settings.comingDescription: Company profile and tariffs — next iteration.
settings.loadErrorDescription: Check your connection and try again.

popular.title: Popular products
popular.emptyDescription: Check back later — we'll refresh the selection.

count.total: {count, plural, =0 {No products} one {# product} other {# products}}

filters.priceBackendGap: Price filter ships when the API supports it.

empty.description: Try adjusting your filters or use a different query.

favorite.comingSoonDescription: We'll enable this feature in the next phase.

cart.addedToastDescription: Open the cart to send your request.
cart.comingSoonDescription: Adding to cart ships in the next phase.

cart.countAria: Cart, {count, plural, one {# item} other {# items}}

topbar.comingSoonDescription: We'll enable this feature in the next phase.

emptyDefault.title: Nothing here yet
emptyDefault.description: When there is data to show, it will appear here.

errorDefault.title: We couldn't load this
errorDefault.description: Try again. If it keeps failing, share the reference below with support.

productDetail.notFoundBody: Check the link or head back to the catalog — the product may have been delisted.
productDetail.views: {count, plural, =0 {No views} one {# view} other {# views}}

quantity.label: Quantity
quantity.unit: {unit, select, ton {tons} kg {kg} piece {pcs} m {m} m2 {m²} other {{unit}}}

cta.addToCartComingSoon: Cart is coming in the next phase.

empty.title: No description yet
empty.description: The seller has not added a description. Ask via chat.

empty.title: No specifications yet
empty.description: The seller has not added specifications for this product.

delivery.placeholder: Confirm delivery terms with the seller.

reviews.emptyBody: We will wire reviews in later phases.

contactSeller.comingSoonBody: We will wire chat with the seller in the next phase.

favorites.title: Favorites
favorites.count: {count, plural, =0 {No items} one {# item} other {# items}}

map.comingSoonDescription: We'll wire the map for favorites in the next phase.

tabs.companiesDisabledTooltip: Company favorites ship when the API supports them.

empty.title: Your favorites are empty
empty.description: Save products you like — they'll show up here.

error.title: We couldn't load favorites
error.description: Try refreshing. If it keeps failing, share the reference below with support.

empty.title: Your cart is empty
empty.description: Add products from the catalog to send a request to suppliers.

summary.title: Total
summary.totalNegotiationNote: Final price is negotiated with the supplier.
summary.messageSellerComingSoonBody: We will wire chat with the seller in the next phase.
summary.trustBody: Your request goes directly to the supplier. Prices and terms are agreed in chat.

submit.errorToast: Couldn't send your request. Try again.
submit.partialFailureToast: Some suppliers didn't receive your request.
submit.partialFailureBody: Couldn't reach {count, plural, one {# supplier} other {# suppliers}}. Try again.

contact.title: Contact details
contact.description: Suppliers will reach out using these details. You can edit them before sending.
contact.signedOutHint: Sign in to autofill your contact details.

empty.title: No results match your query
empty.description: Try adjusting your query or returning to the full list.

error.title: Couldn't load companies
error.description: Try refreshing the page. If the problem persists, share the reference code with us.

card.stubTooltip: Company card is a mockup — it will be enabled once the public API ships.

actions.messageComingSoonBody: Chat with the seller will be enabled in the next phase.

empty.title: Products coming soon
empty.description: We'll connect the public list of company products once the API is available.

empty.title: No reviews yet
empty.description: We'll enable reviews in upcoming phases.

map.title: Map with stores
map.stubNote: Coordinates will appear once the API exposes them.

notFound.title: Company not found
notFound.description: Check the link — the profile may have been removed or not yet published.

error.title: Couldn't load company
error.description: Try refreshing the page. If the problem persists, share the reference code with us.

register.title: Create your account
register.termsBefore: By registering, you agree to our
register.successToast: We sent an email to {email}. Confirm your address to sign in.

verify.successBody: All set. We'll redirect you to the sign-in page in a moment.
verify.errorBody: This link has expired or has already been used. Request a new email.

reset.title: Reset password
reset.body: Enter the email you used to sign up. We'll send a confirmation code.

resetConfirm.title: Set a new password
resetConfirm.body: Enter the code from the email and your new password.
resetConfirm.successToast: Password updated. Sign in with the new password.

validation.nameTwoWords: Enter first and last name separated by a space
validation.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters
validation.usernameRequired: Email not found in the link. Request a new email.

errors.accountLocked: Too many attempts. Account is locked for 15 minutes.
errors.usernameTaken: This email is already registered. Try signing in.
errors.verificationWrong: Confirmation code is wrong or expired.
errors.network: We couldn't reach the server. Check your connection and try again.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

leads.title: My requests
leads.count: {count, plural, =0 {No requests} one {# request} other {# requests}}

empty.title: No requests yet
empty.description: Once you send a request to a supplier, it will appear here.

emptyFiltered.title: No requests with this status
emptyFiltered.description: Try a different status or clear the filter.

error.title: We couldn't load your requests
error.description: Try refreshing. If it keeps failing, share the reference below with support.

error.title: We couldn't load this request
error.description: Close and reopen the request. If it keeps failing, share the reference with support.

cancel.confirmBody: Are you sure you want to cancel request #{id}? This cannot be undone.

list.unreadAria: {count, plural, one {# unread message} other {# unread messages}}

empty.title: No messages yet
empty.body: When a seller replies, your conversations will appear here.

error.title: Couldn't load messages
error.body: Try refreshing the page. If it keeps failing, share the reference code with support.

empty.title: Pick a conversation
empty.body: Choose a contact on the left to start chatting.

notFound.title: Conversation not found
notFound.body: It may have been hidden or removed.

thread.callStubBody: Use the phone number listed on the company card.

empty.title: Send the first message
empty.body: Your conversation history will appear here.

error.title: Couldn't load conversation
error.body: Try again. If it keeps failing, share the reference code with support.

composer.rateLimitedToast: Too many messages. Wait a few seconds.

start.sellerOnlyToast: Only buyers can start a conversation.
start.sellerOnlyBody: Wait for the buyer to open a conversation.

connection.reconnectingBody: Your messages will be sent once the connection returns.
connection.offlineBody: Check your internet and refresh the page.

empty.title: No notifications yet
empty.body: You'll see new requests, seller replies and messages here.

error.title: Couldn't load notifications
error.body: Try again. If it keeps failing, share the reference code with support.

leadNew.title: New request
leadNew.body: {productName, select, undefined {You received a new request.} other {Request for {productName}}}

chatNewMessage.title: New message
chatNewMessage.body: {fromName, select, undefined {You have a new message.} other {{fromName}: new message}}

preferences.title: Notification settings
preferences.subtitle: Choose which notifications you want to receive.

inApp.title: In-app
inApp.body: Show notifications inside the browser and app.

email.title: Email
email.body: Send a copy of notifications to your email.

loadError.title: Couldn't load settings
loadError.body: Try refreshing the page. If it keeps failing, share the reference code.

preferences.webPushNote: Push notifications are delivered to the mobile app — they don't work on the web yet.

shell.title: Account
shell.subtitle: Manage your profile, notifications and interface language.

profile.title: Profile
profile.subtitle: Sellers see this information when you contact them.

loadError.title: Couldn't load the profile
loadError.body: Try refreshing the page. If it keeps failing, share the reference code.

avatar.title: Profile photo
avatar.subtitle: PNG or JPEG, up to 5 MB. A square image works best.

validation.type: Only PNG or JPEG are supported.

language.title: Interface language
language.subtitle: Notifications and emails from SKLADx will use this language.

leads.title: My requests
leads.body: History of your requests to sellers and their statuses.

drawer.title: AI agent — coming soon
drawer.body: The SKLADx assistant will help you find suppliers, draft requests, and decide what to do next. We're getting it ready for launch.
drawer.bullet1: Search suppliers by what you need, not just by product name.
drawer.bullet2: Auto-build carts and requests from your purchase history.
drawer.bullet3: Stay on top of request statuses and seller conversations.
drawer.notifyToastTitle: Thanks — we'll email you at launch.
drawer.notifyToastBody: We'll send it to the address linked to your account.

report.title: Report this {target}
report.descriptionGeneric: Tell us what's wrong with this {target}. A moderator will review your report within 24 hours.
report.descriptionWithLabel: Report on {target}: {label}. A moderator will review it within 24 hours.

SAME.title: Duplicate listing
SAME.body: The same product is already on the marketplace.

FAKE.title: Misleading information
FAKE.body: Price, stock, or specs don't match reality.

OFFENSIVE.title: Offensive content
OFFENSIVE.body: Text, images, or behavior breach community rules.

DUPLICATE.title: Reposted by the same seller
DUPLICATE.body: The same product has been listed multiple times.

SCAM.title: Scam or fraud
SCAM.body: Suspected fraud: prepayment, fake goods, phishing.

report.commentHint: Optional. Adding details helps the moderator triage faster.
report.commentPlaceholder: e.g. The same product is already listed as № 4521.
report.submitError: Couldn't send the report. Please try again.

reports.warnComingSoonBody: We'll wire this when the API ships.

addProduct.title: Add product

upload.title: Click or drop a file
upload.selectedCount: {count, plural, =0 {No files selected} one {# file} other {# files}}
upload.wrongType: Only PNG and JPEG are supported.

submit.photoUploadWarning: Product saved, but some photos failed to upload.

addProduct.noCompanyHint: Company isn't verified yet. Finish verification to add products.
